---
title: "Shifted maximum component search"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup}
rm(list = ls())

locate_one_row_dir <- function() {
  candidates <- character()

  input_path <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) "")
  if (length(input_path) == 1 && nzchar(input_path)) {
    candidates <- c(
      candidates,
      dirname(normalizePath(input_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE))
    )
  }

  candidates <- c(
    candidates,
    normalizePath(getwd(), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE),
    normalizePath(file.path(getwd(), "VKR", "VKR_TEXT", "scripts", "one_row"), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  )

  candidates <- unique(candidates[file.exists(file.path(candidates, "shift_component_search.Rmd"))])
  if (length(candidates) == 0) {
    stop("Could not locate shift_component_search.Rmd directory.")
  }

  normalizePath(candidates[1], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

script_dir <- locate_one_row_dir()
project_root <- normalizePath(file.path(script_dir, "..", ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
repo_root <- normalizePath(file.path(project_root, "..", ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
setwd(script_dir)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)

source(file.path(repo_root, "ssa-based methods", "cssa-transform.r"))

set.seed(1111)
```

## Parameters

```{r parameters}
n <- 100
sigma_noise <- 0.2
num_components_signal <- 1

fixed_noise_matrix <- add.noise(matrix(0, nrow = 1, ncol = n), sigma = sigma_noise)

build_fixed_noise_case <- function(signal_ind, noise_matrix) {
  clean_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = 1, ncol = n)
  clean_matrix[1, signal_ind] <- 1

  noisy_matrix <- clean_matrix + noise_matrix
  noisy_dft_matrix <- dft(noisy_matrix)
  fit <- ssa(noisy_dft_matrix[1, ], kind = "cssa", svd.method = "svd")

  est <- Re(idft.row(cssa.row(noisy_dft_matrix, num.line = num_components_signal)))
  est <- as.numeric(est[1, ])

  list(
    signal_ind = signal_ind,
    max_ind = which.max(est),
    clean_matrix = clean_matrix,
    noisy_matrix = noisy_matrix,
    noisy_dft_matrix = noisy_dft_matrix,
    fit = fit,
    est = est
  )
}
```

## Search helpers

```{r helpers}
reconstruct_component_row <- function(fit, component_index) {
  component_dft <- Rssa::reconstruct(
    fit,
    groups = list(component = component_index)
  )$component

  reconstruction <- as.numeric(Re(idft.row(matrix(component_dft, nrow = 1))))

  list(
    component_dft = component_dft,
    reconstruction = reconstruction
  )
}

find_shift_case <- function(noise_matrix, build_case, search_idx = 7:ncol(noise_matrix)) {
  for (candidate_signal_ind in search_idx) {
    candidate_case <- build_case(candidate_signal_ind, noise_matrix)
    if (candidate_case$max_ind != candidate_case$signal_ind) {
      return(candidate_case)
    }
  }

  stop("No shifted maximum case found.")
}

find_component_with_true_max <- function(case, max_components = 12L) {
  max_components <- min(max_components, length(case$fit$sigma))

  component_info <- lapply(seq_len(max_components), function(component_index) {
    rec <- reconstruct_component_row(case$fit, component_index)
    row <- rec$reconstruction
    max_ind <- which.max(row)

    data.frame(
      component = component_index,
      singular_value = case$fit$sigma[component_index],
      max_singular_value = max(case$fit$sigma),
      max_ind = max_ind,
      true_ind = case$signal_ind,
      true_value = row[case$signal_ind],
      max_value = row[max_ind],
      abs_shift = abs(max_ind - case$signal_ind)
    )
  })

  component_info <- do.call(rbind, component_info)
  exact <- component_info[component_info$max_ind == component_info$true_ind, ]

  if (nrow(exact) > 0) {
    chosen <- exact[which.max(exact$singular_value), ]
    chosen$selection_rule <- "max_ind == true_ind; largest singular value among exact hits"
  } else {
    chosen <- component_info[order(component_info$abs_shift, -component_info$true_value), ][1, ]
    chosen$selection_rule <- "no exact hit; closest argmax to true index"
  }

  rec <- reconstruct_component_row(case$fit, as.integer(chosen$component[1]))
  component_table <- data.frame(
    index = seq_along(rec$component_dft),
    component_real = Re(rec$component_dft),
    component_imag = Im(rec$component_dft),
    reconstruction = rec$reconstruction
  )

  list(
    shift_case = data.frame(
      true_ind = case$signal_ind,
      cssa_rank1_max_ind = case$max_ind,
      cssa_rank1_true_value = case$est[case$signal_ind],
      cssa_rank1_max_value = case$est[case$max_ind]
    ),
    component_scores = component_info,
    chosen_component = chosen,
    component = rec$component_dft,
    reconstruction = rec$reconstruction,
    component_table = component_table
  )
}
```

## Result

```{r result}
shift_case <- find_shift_case(
  fixed_noise_matrix,
  build_case = build_fixed_noise_case,
  search_idx = 7:n
)

component_search <- find_component_with_true_max(shift_case, max_components = 12L)

component_search$shift_case
component_search$component_scores
component_search$chosen_component
component_search$component_table
```

```{r plots}
old_par <- par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(3, 4, 3, 1))

plot(
  shift_case$est,
  type = "h",
  lwd = 2,
  col = "grey40",
  xlab = "Index",
  ylab = "Amplitude",
  main = sprintf("CSSA rank 1: %d -> %d", shift_case$signal_ind, shift_case$max_ind)
)
abline(v = shift_case$signal_ind, col = "firebrick", lty = 2)
abline(v = shift_case$max_ind, col = "steelblue", lty = 2)

plot(
  component_search$reconstruction,
  type = "h",
  lwd = 2,
  col = "grey20",
  xlab = "Index",
  ylab = "Amplitude",
  main = sprintf(
    "Component %d: maximum %d",
    component_search$chosen_component$component,
    component_search$chosen_component$max_ind
  )
)
abline(v = shift_case$signal_ind, col = "firebrick", lty = 2)
abline(v = component_search$chosen_component$max_ind, col = "steelblue", lty = 2)

par(old_par)
```
